.canvas-card-menu.background: rgb(29, 33, 40) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.file-embed.background: rgb(50, 52, 73) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.multi-select-pill.background: rgba(82, 250, 124, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.nav-file-title.background: rgb(29, 33, 40) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(44, 46, 57) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.tag.background: rgba(82, 250, 124, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(33, 35, 55) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.background: rgb(33, 35, 55) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(33, 35, 55) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.is-clickable.mod-collapsible.nav-fol.background: rgb(29, 33, 40) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgb(29, 33, 40) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.is-clickable.mod-collapsible.tree-it.background: rgb(29, 33, 40) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.is-selected.mod-complex.suggestion-i.background: rgb(112, 129, 208) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(33, 35, 55) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-complex.suggestion-item.background: rgb(112, 129, 208) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(29, 33, 40) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(29, 33, 40) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.multi-select-pill.background: rgba(82, 250, 124, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(33, 35, 55) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(29, 33, 40) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked.background: rgb(55, 244, 153) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked::after.background: rgb(33, 35, 55) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(40, 42, 54) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

mark.background: rgb(50, 52, 73) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(40, 42, 54) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(40, 42, 54) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
